Agora beta: some features are still in development. Please report bugs and feedback using this form. Follow the changelog for updates.

Optimism Agora
ProposalsVotersRetroPGF

Agora is the home of Optimism voters

OP Delegates are the stewards of the Optimism Token House, appointed by token holders to make governance decisions on their behalf.

Delegated / Total supply
88.75M OP / 4.295B OP
Quorum
26.63M OP
